After winning a gold medal at the inaugural Nelson Mandela Cup in South Africa last month, team captain Elizabeth Andiego is ready for another big assignment.The epic task ahead is the second leg of World Olympic qualifiers to be held in Bangkok, Thailand from May 24 to June 2.Get Full Access for Ksh299/WeekUncover the stories others won’t tell. title: Andiego leads boxers in Paris Olympic qualifiers
author: Ben Ahenda
description: Kenya coach expects to send a team of 12 boxers - seven male and five female athletes to Thailand.
keywords: ["Kenya Boxing Federation","Elizabeth Andiego","Nelson Mandela Cup","Paris Olympics"]
